sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Duke Energy는 전략적 자산 매각과 Florida Progress 지분 투자 유치를 통해 성장 자본을 확보하며 안정적인 운영을 지속하고 있습니다.

keyPoints.text: Florida Progress의 지분 9.19%를 Brookfield에 매각하여 28억 달러의 현금을 확보하며 향후 성장을 위한 자본 조달을 완료했습니다.
Piedmont의 테네시 사업부 매각을 완료하였으며, 이와 관련된 영업권 상각 및 세금 비용 1억 9,600만 달러가 재무제표에 반영되었습니다.
전력 판매량은 총 65,454 GWh로 전년 동기 65,242 GWh 대비 소폭 증가하며 견조한 수요를 유지하고 있습니다.

riskChanges.text: 2025년 연례 보고서에 명시된 위험 요인들이 여전히 회사의 재무 상태와 미래 성과에 중대한 영향을 미칠 수 있는 잠재적 리스크로 존재합니다.

businessChanges.text: 연료비 및 전력 구매 비용이 24억 4,000만 달러로 전년 동기 21억 1,900만 달러 대비 증가하며 운영 비용 상승 압력이 발생했습니다.
인프라 투자 확대에 따라 감가상각비가 14억 9,800만 달러로 전년 동기 13억 3,400만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 영업이익은 27억 2,500만 달러, 순이익은 15억 5,000만 달러를 기록했습니다.
총자산은 1,980억 4,800만 달러이며, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 21억 4,000만 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 전략적 자산 매각을 통한 자본 확보는 긍정적이나, 연료비 및 운영 비용 상승이 영업이익률에 미치는 영향을 지속적으로 모니터링해야 합니다.

Quarter ended 2026-03-31 total assets = 1,980억 4,800만 달러 (USD 198.048B; 198,048 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.
Quarter ended 2026-03-31 cash and cash equivalents = 21억 4,000만 달러 (USD 2.14B; 2,140 million), XBRL range instant..2026-03-31.

ITEM 1A. RISK FACTORS In addition to the other information set forth in this report, careful consideration should be given to the factors discussed in Part I, “Item 1A. Risk Factors” in Duke Energy's Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ended December 31, 2025, which could materially affect the Duke Energy Registrants’ financial condition or future results. <div

Overview Executing on Strategic Transactions. Our service territories continue to experience accelerating investment opportunities driven by a deepening economic development pipeline and significant customer growth. In March, we closed on two previously announced strategic transactions to efficiently fund this growth and the related capital that will be required in the coming years. On March 3, 2026, we completed the first closing of a minority investment in Florida Progress, the holding company of Duke Energy Florida, by an affiliate of Brookfield Super-Core Infrastructure Partners. The initial investment resulted in the transfer of a 9.19% ownership interest for approximately $2.8 billion in cash proceeds, with additional staged investments anticipated through 2028. On March 31, 2026, following approval by the TPUC, we closed on the sale of Piedmont's Tennessee business with Spire, Inc  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.8 billion = 28억 달러; $2.8 = 2.8달러.

Revenues. (b) Net of $196 million tax expense which includes the impact of nondeductible goodwill related to the sale of Piedmont's Tennessee business. $374 million recorded within Gains on Sales of Other Assets and Other, net and $7 million recorded within Property and other taxes. (c) Recorded in Income from Discontinued Operations, net of tax. SEGMENT RESULTS The remaining information presented in this discussion of results of operations is on a GAAP basis. Management evaluates segment performance based on segment income. Segment income is defined as income from continuing operations net of income attributable to noncontrolling interests and preferred stock dividends. Segment income includes intercompany revenues and expenses that are eliminated on the Condensed Consolidated Financial Statements.
